PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RALSTON CAPITAL-SF MULTIFAMILY IV, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HICKEY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
